content:
type: INTENT
files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
summary: Will add optional path_transform=None param to BaseLoader-derived __init__ methods (FileSystemLoader, PackageLoader, DictLoader, FunctionLoader, PrefixLoader, ChoiceLoader) and apply it as first statement in each get_source (transform local template var, keep original name for TemplateNotFound errors). In FileSystemLoader.get_source I'll only insert a single line at the top computing the transformed template var before split_template_path - shouldn't touch your fallback_searchpath loop logic. Will coordinate again before finalizing if needed.
